28.reason: scanf("%c") reads the whitespace character left in the input buffer by the previous scanf("%d%d"), which prevents correct detection of the newline character to break the loop.

76.reason: [This loop accesses zhi[i+1] and xi[i+1] when i can be count-1, causing out-of-bounds read. Also, shifting array elements manually like this is error-prone and may skip terms or cause infinite loops due to i--.]

34.reason: [The second polynomial input loop may not execute because the first loop already consumed all input including the newline; using !=EOF here is incorrect since after the first '\n', the next scanf may fail or behave unexpectedly. Also, mixing formatted and character input without proper handling leads to input parsing errors.]
